svg.title: The hyperscaler AI race, 2023 versus 2026
svg.desc: Side-by-side panels. In 2023, Microsoft led with Azure and OpenAI exclusivity, Amazon and Meta were in the hunt, and Alphabet was the laggard after the Bard failure. By 2026, Alphabet leads, Amazon and Microsoft are in the hunt, and Meta is the laggard. Alphabet backs Anthropic and sells compute to OpenAI. Amazon invests in both labs. Microsoft invests in OpenAI and Anthropic. Meta signs a compute deal with Anthropic.
